summary: package eu.kalafatic.evolution.controller.agents; import eu.kalafatic.evolution.controller.tools.FileTool; public class FileAgent extends BaseAiAgent { public FileAgent(eu.kalafatic.evolution.controller.orchestration.SessionContainer container) { super("File", "File", container); addTool(new FileTool()); } @Override protected String getAgentInstructions() { return "You are an AI File Agent. You specialize in reading, writing, and managing files."; } }
